summary: Completed testing of Yu-Gi-Oh Card Creator new features and bug fixes. Backend APIs fully support new fields (descriptionFontSize, thumbnail). Core functionality working well including Save as New, export features, and navigation. Several frontend features still need implementation.

missing_features.feature: Font size slider in Card Text section
missing_features.issue: Font size slider not implemented with data-testid='font-size-slider'
missing_features.expected_location: Card Text section after description input

missing_features.issue: Auto button not implemented with data-testid='font-size-auto-btn'
missing_features.expected_location: Next to font size slider in Card Text section

missing_features.feature: Save image data to DB checkbox

missing_features.issue: Re-upload hint not implemented with data-testid='reupload-hint'
missing_features.expected_location: Should appear when card has file: reference but no local image

passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/cards accepts descriptionFontSize and thumbnail fields
Backend API: descriptionFontSize and thumbnail fields saved and returned correctly
Frontend: 'Save as New' button appears only when editing existing card
Frontend: 'Save as New' button creates copy of card when clicked
Frontend: PNG export button triggers download from editor
Frontend: JSON export button triggers download from editor
Frontend: Collection page loads with cards displayed
Frontend: Export All button triggers download from collection
Frontend: Per-card PNG export buttons work in collection
Frontend: Per-card JSON export buttons work in collection
Frontend: Edit card button navigates to editor with card loaded
Frontend: Navigation between Editor and Collection tabs works
Frontend: Card canvas has correct Yu-Gi-Oh proportions (420x614)
Frontend: Card rendering shows proper layout with cream description box
Frontend: Image URL input loads and displays images in card preview
Frontend: File upload input present in image controls
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement missing frontend features: (1) Font size slider and Auto button in Card Text section with proper data-testids, (2) Save image data to DB checkbox in image controls, (3) Re-upload hint functionality for file references, (4) Ensure all new features have proper data-testid attributes for testing
